message:
chore(robot): remove unused helper functions

Remove two dead code functions from the robot package:

1. hostname() in helpers.go - unused wrapper around os.Hostname()
2. outputSchemaJSON() in schema.go - unused JSON output helper

Also clean up unused imports (encoding/json, os) from schema.go
that were only needed by the removed function.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,9 +3,7 @@
 package robot
 
 import (
-	"encoding/json"
 	"fmt"
-	"os"
 	"reflect"
 	"strings"
 	"time"
@@ -281,10 +279,3 @@ func generateDescription(name string) string {
 
 	return desc
 }
-
-// outputJSON encodes value as pretty-printed JSON to stdout.
-func outputSchemaJSON(v interface{}) error {
-	encoder := json.NewEncoder(os.Stdout)
-	encoder.SetIndent("", "  ")
-	return encoder.Encode(v)
-}
